storyline: NuScale Power (SMR) builds small modular reactors. It rose through mid-2024 on the nuclear-revival trade — AI datacenters scrambling for clean baseload power, and Washington turning pro-nuclear. The move peaked when the ADVANCE Act was signed (July 9, 2024) — the Accelerating Deployment of Versatile, Advanced Nuclear for Clean Energy Act, which streamlines NRC licensing and fees for advanced / small modular reactors. Classic buy-the-rumor / sell-the-news: SMR topped ~July 15, then fell ~44%. What we'd want: exit as the bill is signed (the catalyst resolves) — which the agent did, exiting 2024-07-12 within ~3 days and ~3% of the peak, dodging the crash.
